# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

Resources:
  WebServerInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-074567890abcdef0123
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      KeyName: my_key_pair
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - sg-04567890abcdef0123
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          sudo yum update -y
          sudo yum install -y git
          # Add your application installation and configuration commands here
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/sda1
          Ebs:
            VolumeType: gp2
            VolumeSize: 8

Outputs:
  WebServerInstanceId:
    Description: ID of the web server instance
    Value: !Ref WebServerInstance
